idea: A web app for a small auto repair shop to manage their job queue. Customers can book appointments online, the shop owner can see all jobs in a kanban board (Waiting, In Progress, Done), mechanics are assigned to jobs, customers get SMS/email updates when their car is ready. The shop wants to cut phone calls by 70% and average turnaround from 3 days to 1.5 days.

inputs.label: Raw Product Idea
inputs.content_ref: A web app for a small auto repair shop to manage their job queue. Customers can book appointments online, the shop owner can see all jobs in a kanban board (Waiting, In Progress, Done), mechanics are assigned to jobs, customers get SMS/email updates when their car is ready. The shop wants to cut phone calls by 70% and average turnaround from 3 days to 1.5 days.

inputs.label: Current Pain Points
inputs.content_ref: Currently using a paper logbook and sticky notes. Miss ~20% of callback appointments. Customers call 2-3x to check status.
